definitions: Fastening or securing with a peg or pegs.
Fixing (a price, rate, or level) at a particular amount or level.
Identifying or classifying someone or something.
Throwing a peg or other object, especially in baseball.
Engaging in anal sex with a strap-on dildo, typically by a woman on a man.
examples: She was pegging the tent down.
The government is pegging the currency.
He was pegging her as a potential leader.
The catcher was pegging the ball to second base.
They were discussing the act of pegging.
